name: stockyard-multicall
description: Send the same prompt to multiple LLMs simultaneously. Pick the fastest, cheapest, longest, or consensus response.

tools.name: multicall_stats
tools.description: Get multi-call statistics: wins per model, avg latency, cost comparison.

tools.name: multicall_routes
tools.description: List configured multi-call routes and their strategies.

tools.name: multicall_compare
tools.description: Send a prompt to all models and return all responses for comparison.

tools.name: multicall_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the MultiCall proxy is running and healthy.
